title: The 3 Most Undervalued Dividend Stocks to Buy in May 2023
text: The stock market downturn that began early last year has left a lot of investors reasonably stressed out. That said, recent Fed rate hikes and looming recession fears aren't making anything easier for us.

title: Lennox to Present at the 2023 Oppenheimer Conference held virtually and Goldman Sachs Conference in New York
text: RICHARDSON, Texas , May 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Lennox (NYSE: LII), a leader in energy-efficient climate control solutions, today announced that CEO Alok Maskara and CFO Joe Reitmeier are scheduled to present at the Oppenheimer 18th Annual Industrial Growth Conference, being held virtually, on Tuesday, May 9, beginning at 09:45 a.m. Eastern time.
